title: Pin It! - JEI addon
description: Pin and move recipes anywhere on your screen.
body:
# Pin It!

**Pin It!** is a small quality-of-life mod that lets you pin JEI recipes directly on your screen.

No more opening the same recipe over and over again while crafting. Just pin the recipe you need, move it wherever you want, and keep playing without losing track.

![Замените это описанием](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60015e78bf955bb54d9b9d823f2145bd9b6f61f8.png)

## Features

- Pin JEI recipes on your screen
- Move pinned recipes freely
- Keep important crafting steps visible while playing
- Reduce constant JEI reopening
- Clean, simple, and lightweight
- Great for large modpacks with complex crafting chains
- Change Size

## Why use it?

Big modpacks often turn one recipe into five more recipes, then ten more, then suddenly you forgot what you were crafting in the first place.

**Pin It!** keeps the recipe in front of you, so you can focus on building, crafting, and progressing.

Simple idea. Big comfort.

## Requirements

- [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei/versions)
